docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $100. SERVED NOV-05-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COPA AIRLINES
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHOSRAVAN, MOJDEH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COPA AIRLINES $2,774.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,924.00, CONSIDERING NO OPPOSITION TOTALITY OF EVIDENCE BY PLAINTIFF AT HEARING VOUCHER VALUE GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY KHOSRAVAN, MOJDEH AS TO DEFENDANT COPA AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO YVES A. MOSQUERA-ATTEMPTED NOT KNOW/UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-12-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MOJDEH KHOSRAVAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COPA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHOSRAVAN, MOJDEH AS TO DEFENDANT COPA AIRLINES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF MOJDEH KHOSRAVAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COPA AIRLINES IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT VOIR DIRES PLAINTIFF IN REGARDS TO THE FORM OF SERVICE MADE ON DEFENDANT. COURT IS SATISFIED WITH THE PERSONAL SERVICE MADE ON DEFENDANT. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2023 - JUDGMENT.
